creator: jochen@daten-chaos.de
text:
Port editors/openoffice4 rejects building with the below shown error message.


deliver -- version: 275594
LOG: writing /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/aoo-4.0.1/main/solver/401/unxfbsdx.pro/inc/svgio/deliver.log
Module 'svgio' delivered successfully. 0 files copied, 1 files unchanged

1 module(s): 
        nss
need(s) to be rebuilt

Reason(s):

ERROR: error 65280 occurred while making /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/aoo-4.0.1/main/nss

When you have fixed the errors in that module you can resume the build by running:

        build --from nss

*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4

How-To-Repeat: root@phantomias:/usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4 # make LOCALIZED_LANG=de install clean
